title: An Ordinance Enacting the Supplemental Budget for the Year 2025 in the Amount of Four Hundred Thousand Pesos and 00/100 (Php 400,000.00) Chargeable Against the Financial Grant (Provincial Fund-assistance to LGU's Participation in the Trade Fair Booth Competition and other Related Events in Support of the Annual Laguna Provincial Festival" Ani ng Laguna 2025 ."
